items.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
items.summary: A record high in long-term holder supply typically signals conviction. CryptoQuant says it reflects a shortage of new buyers, a view echoed by weakening ETF demand and bearish prediction market odds.

items.title: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
items.summary: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling

items.title: Gemini taps Grok for personalized AI-powered prediction market feeds
items.summary: Gemini is leaning into AI features for its prediction market, following other crypto exchanges in moving beyond crypto trading amid a market slump.

items.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
items.summary: Bulls abandon ship as SOL futures open interest dropped 30% in May. With the price weakening near $80, Solana may be destined for new lows.

items.title: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
items.summary: The investment firm said nation-states and central banks are increasingly turning to assets like Bitcoin and gold as alternative settlement systems outside of US control.

items.title: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
items.summary: Kalshi sued Minnesota while the CFTC filed against Rhode Island as legal wrangling with state-level authorities seems likely headed to the US Supreme Court.

items.title: Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
items.summary: As more than $1 billion exited spot Bitcoin ETFs last week, Calamos says investors are rotating into Bitcoin products with built-in downside protection.

items.title: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
items.summary: The purchase pushed the Nasdaq-listed company ahead of Coinbase Global to become the fourth-largest public corporate holder of Ether, according to CoinGecko data.

items.title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
items.summary: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

items.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce defends crypto privacy tools against surveillance push
items.summary: The leader of the regulator's Crypto Task Force said privacy-enhancing technologies can strengthen investor protection and urged regulators not to treat them with suspicion.

items.title: Bitcoin enters cooldown phase under $75K as ‘active distribution’ rises
items.summary: Bitcoin’s slide toward $73,000 triggered active distribution signals, but lowered realized losses and weak spot volumes point to easing sell pressure.

items.title: Trump claims he can ‘future proof’ crypto regulation with CLARITY Act
items.summary: The future of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress is still uncertain amid concerns over ethics provisions, with the president, whose crypto ties are under scrutiny, weighing in on social media.

items.title: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
items.summary: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.

items.title: France's AMF regulator sets June 30 deadline for MiCA licensing
items.summary: The European Union's Markets in Crypto Assets regulations first took effect in 2024, but gave crypto service providers time to fully comply with the framework.

items.title: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
items.summary: Blockchain network Sui is suffering another period of significant downtime barely five months after the last "network stall."

items.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
items.summary: FalconX has hired Cantor and other bankers to advise on a potential IPO and confidentially filed draft paperwork with the SEC, though the listing is not expected until later this year amid volatile market conditions.

items.title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
items.summary: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

items.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war

items.summary: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

items.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
